title: Phase B 오케스트레이션
contract_parity: in-process dispatch vs live HTTP worker (Bun.serve on ephemeral port + real fetch round-trip) produce IDENTICAL StructuredResult (verdict/assertions/confidence/ruleVersion/scenarioHash) — G005 verification met.

adversarial.scenario: same job in-process vs over HTTP

adversarial.expected: input order preserved, verdict counts correct

note: standalone/worker are the same runner artifact; a node runs standalone (executeJob) or host-driven (POST /run). Live browser worker (BrowserPage) reuses this exact protocol; fixture model used for deterministic verification.
